calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust Provisions.
Off Calendar Apr-14-2015 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust Provisions.
Off Calendar Feb-25-2015 Continued To Apr-17-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Boessenecker for and with Frances Fung (Trustee). Paul Perdue for and with Allen Fung Jr. (Petitioner).

Mr. Boessenecker requested for a trial date ASAP, stated that his client is making the mortgage payments and that she is on a fixed income. Mr. Perdue agreed that a trial date can be set. Mr. Boessenecker stated that the trial will take two one-half days and that he has three witnesses. The Court set this matter for trial on April 17, 2015 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. All witness list, exhibit list, trial brief and additional pleadings are to be filed by April 10, 2015. The Court will discuss and set the second part of the trial on April 17, 2015.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy S. Park. (Not Reported)

Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust Provisions.
Off Calendar Feb-04-2015 Continued To Feb-25-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust Provisions.
Off Calendar Jan-21-2015 Continued To Feb-04-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil
Off Calendar Jan-07-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato for and with Allen Fung Jr. John Boessenecker for and with Frances Fung.

Mr. Fung stated that he does not object to the motion to be relieved as counsel, The Court granted the motion (order signed in open court). Mr. Boessenecker reported that the parties tried mediation, the matter did not settle, raised the issue of Allen Fung Jr. not making any effort to pay the $54,000.00 loan and expressed concern regarding his clients financial situation. Mr. Fung stated that he has not received any information or an accounting. The petition to determine construction of trust provisions was continued to January 21, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status. The court indicated, by that time Mr. Fung needs to have counsel in place.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Lelu. (Not Reported)

Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust Provisions.
Off Calendar Jan-07-2015 Continued To Jan-21-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust Provisions.
Off Calendar Dec-16-2014 Continued To Jan-07-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust Provisions.
Off Calendar Oct-24-2014 Continued To Dec-16-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust Provisions.
Off Calendar Jul-31-2014 Continued To Oct-24-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust Provisions.
Off Calendar Jun-05-2014 Continued To Aug-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust Provisions.
Off Calendar Apr-29-2014 Continued To Jun-20-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato for Allen Fung Jr. John Boessenecker also present.

The Petition to Determine Construction of Trust Provisions was continued to June 20, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a half day evidentiary hearing. Briefs, witness lists and exhibit lists are due by June 13, 2014.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust Provisions.
Off Calendar Feb-11-2014 Continued To Apr-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Boessenecker for Frances Fung. Brent Kato for with Allen Fung, Jr.

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than April 22, 2014. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by April 22, 2014. The Petition to Determine Construction of Trust Provisions was continued to and the Parties are to return on April 29, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust Provisions.
Off Calendar Dec-10-2013 Continued To Feb-11-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust Provisions.
Off Calendar Nov-12-2013 Continued To Dec-10-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato for and with Allen Fung Jr (Petitioner). William Taylor for and with Frances Fung (Trustee).

Mr. Kato stated that they have not agreed to mediation and that the matter should be ruled on. Mr. Taylor stated that the issue of eligibility of Allen Fung Jr. as a beneficiary is conditioned upon Allen having repaid all monies he took on the line of credit, that it should have been paid at the time of death of the Trustor, that they do not need discovery or a trial, and that the legal instrument is unambiguous. Mr. Kato argued that the instrument is ambiguous, that they will need to do some discovery, that there has not been a tender, that they will need to get the drafting Attorney's (Roger Meredith) testimony and that 60-days should be sufficient. The Petition to Determine Construction of Trust Provisions was continued to December 10, 2013 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file simultaneous briefs regarding the issue of ambiguity and the Court receiving extrinsic evidence. The Court stated that the issue of the amount owed on the line of credit by Allen Fung Jr. is not clear. Briefs are due by December 3, 2013.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Loos. (Not Reported)

Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust Provisions.
Off Calendar Oct-29-2013 Continued To Nov-12-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust Provisions.
Off Calendar Oct-08-2013 Continued To Oct-29-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato for and with Allen Fung Jr. (Petitioner). Larry Lee for and with Frances Fung (Respondent).

Mr. Kato stated that his Client is willing to proceed with the recommendation of the Probate Examiner to proceed with mediation. The matter was passed for Mr. Lee to speak with his Client. Upon returning and the matter being re-called, Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to why language of the Trust is ambiguous, the issue of whether the $54,000.00 line of credit was a gift or a loan to Allen Jr., whether that amount is accurate and what the funds were used for, whether the time to repay the loan/line of credit has passed based on the terms of the Trust, whether Allen Jr. is entitled to a share of the Trust, whether Allen Jr. is a beneficiary, whether the balance of the line of credit could be an offset, the issue of the Grandchildren being disqualified, etc. The Petition to Terminate Trust was continued to October 29, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the Parties to consider mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust Provisions.
Off Calendar Sep-24-2013 Continued To Oct-08-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust Provisions.
Off Calendar Jul-30-2013 Continued To Sep-24-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
